caption: A man with a tall, grey, spiked wig and glasses sits in a studio setting, wearing a white dress shirt, a red bow tie, and suspenders. He wears black headphones and is positioned behind a black microphone. Behind him, a wall is decorated with numerous framed photos and clothing items, including a yellow shirt with the text "LEE". On the left side of the screen, a logo reads "FIRST TALK PODCAST", and on the right, a logo says "LESS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man shifts his gaze and posture; he begins by looking slightly downward and to the side, then looks forward toward the microphone, before bowing his head further and looking down. His facial expression remains relatively neutral as he adjusts his position slightly within the frame.
